mapper.select: SELECT partner_id, partner_role, active FROM tb_trade_partner WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND partner_id = #{partnerId} LIMIT 1
SELECT part_id, part_code FROM tb_pc_part WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND part_id = #{partId} AND active = TRUE LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_stock_document ( company_id, partner_id, document_no, document_type, document_status, reason, processed_by ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{partnerId}, #{documentNo}, #{documentType}, #{documentStatus}, #{reason}, #{processedBy} )

INSERT INTO tb_stock_movement ( company_id, document_id, part_id, movement_type, movement_status, quantity, before_quantity, after_quantity, reason, processed_by ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{documentId}, #{partId}, #{movementType}, #{movementStatus}, #{quantity}, #{beforeQuantity}, #{afterQuantity}, #{reason}, #{processedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(internal_serial_no, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM tb_pc_part_unit WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND internal_serial_no LIKE CONCAT(#{serialPrefix}, '-', #{dateToken}, '-%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pc_part_unit ( company_id, part_id, internal_serial_no, manufacturer_serial_no, unit_status, grade, inspection_status, sales_status, active, created_by ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{partId}, #{internalSerialNo}, #{manufacturerSerialNo}, #{unitStatus}, #{grade}, #{inspectionStatus}, #{salesStatus}, #{active}, #{createdBy} )
INSERT INTO tb_stock_movement_unit ( movement_id, unit_id, before_unit_status, after_unit_status ) VALUES ( #{movementId}, #{unitId}, NULL, #{afterUnitStatus} )
